## MP2 Main-Segment CPU Call Inventory

Call counts are `jal` sites in [`asm/1060.s`](../asm/1060.s) only.

Covers libultra OS primitives and Hudson engine CPU APIs (HuPrc, heaps, MainFS).
Overlay-local calls at `0x80102800` are not included.

### OS — Threads and Scheduling

| Function | VRAM | Calls in main |
|----------|------|---------------|
| `osCreateThread` | `0x800A6030` | 15 |
| `osStartThread` | `0x800A62D0` | 20 |
| `osStopThread` | `0x800A63F0` | 1 |
| `osSetThreadPri` | `0x800A6200` | 8 |
| `osGetThreadPri` | `0x800A61E0` | 4 |
